# Malik Farooq - AI Digital Marketing & Automation Expert

I am a Digital Marketing & AI Automation Expert specializing in building intelligent systems and data-driven marketing strategies that scale business growth. I help brands bridge the gap between human creativity and machine efficiency through Agentic AI and autonomous workflows.

## Key Expertise
- Agentic AI Marketing & LLM Orchestration
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- n8n Automation Workflows
- E-commerce Growth & Fraud Protection (Shopify)
- Predictive Analytics & Lead Scoring

## Core Projects
- **Social Watchdog**: Autonomous AI monitoring brand mentions and sentiment.
- **ShoppiGuard**: AI-powered fraud detection for Shopify.
- **ProfitLens**: LLM-driven ad performance analyzer.
- **SellerOps AI**: Multi-agent marketplace optimization system.
- **Pakistan Property AI Platform**: RAG-based real estate discovery engine.

## Latest Insights (Blog)
I regularly write about the intersection of AI and Marketing. Key topics include:
- The shift from SEO to GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).
- Building autonomous sales agents.
- Orchestrating multi-agent systems with n8n.
- Practical guide to `llms.txt`.
